PART ABOUT THE BOTS:

I'm going through all the requests :D I'm sick so I'm being a bit slow but I swear I'll do all of them. I really really enjoy doing them so feel free to send them in. I'm going through the Vox ones first since they're easier lol. I also had to update the lorebook for this one: Lute, Sera, Emily and Abel should be accurate now ^^

PERSONAL PART:

Something amazing happened today so I wanted to share it with fellow Vox simps and enjoyers alike. I woke up with a bunch of Vox merch on my desk. Turns out my family knows of my obsession by now and wanted to surprise me ^D^ I'm so happy

If you have any requests, you're free to comment them on any of my bots, or to send them in the form if you wish to remain anonymous:
